title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Sikandra
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Sikandra assembly segment.

title: Political rally in Sikandra draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Sikandra promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.
